assessments.name: Global Skills Development Report
assessments.description: This report is designed to be given to individuals who have completed the Global Skills Assessment (GSA). With coverage across the Great 8 Domains, this measure of self-reported behaviors offers a complete overview of their current skills.

assessments.name: Global Skills Assessment
assessments.description: The Global Skills Assessment (GSA) is an assessment used to measure 96 discrete skills/behaviors aligned to SHL's Universal Competency Framework (UCF).

assessments.name: Core Java (Advanced Level) (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of basic Java constructs, OOP concepts, files and exception handling, and advanced Java concepts like generics, collections, threads, strings and concurrency.

assessments.name: Core Java (Entry Level) (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of basic Java constructs, OOP concepts, file handling, exception handling, threads, generic class and inner class.

assessments.name: Java 8 (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Java class design, exceptions, generics, collections, concurrency, JDBC and Java I/O fundamentals.

assessments.name: Java Design Patterns (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of the types of design patterns in Java and principles like threads and refactoring used in Java design patterns.

assessments.name: Java Frameworks (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of different Java frameworks - Struts, Hibernate and Spring.

assessments.name: Spring (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Spring core, AOP, IOC container and transactions.

assessments.name: RESTful Web Services (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of REST features, architecture, handling requests, producing responses, entity translation, working with return types, security, filters, and interceptors.

assessments.name: SQL (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of SQL queries, data manipulation and transaction processing.

assessments.name: SQL Server (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of basic SQL queries, creating and altering tables, filtering, grouping, aggregation in SQL and querying multiple tables.

assessments.name: Amazon Web Services (AWS) Development (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of AWS delivery process, monitoring, metrics, logging, security, validation and scalability.

assessments.name: Docker (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Docker container, data management, Docker performance and swarm.

assessments.name: Kubernetes (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of the architecture, cluster and services of Kubernetes.

assessments.name: Jenkins (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Jenkins configuration and deployment, plugins, nodes, build jobs and testing.

assessments.name: Microservices (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Microservices architecture, SOA, and Microservices patterns.

assessments.name: Git (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of how to use GIT for version control.

assessments.name: Linux Administration (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of the Linux operating system and its application in system administration and network administration.

assessments.name: Linux Programming (General)
assessments.description: Measures knowledge of programming in a Linux environment. Designed for experienced programmers, covering AutoConf/AutoMake, Makefiles, C/C++, Debugging Programs, Platform Independence, Revision Control, RPC/CORBA, and X Programming.

assessments.name: Networking and Implementation (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of networking devices, protocols, reference models, routing and implementation of networks.

assessments.name: Cloud Computing (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of cloud computing concepts, cloud service models, virtualization and private clouds.

assessments.name: Python (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Python programming, databases, modules and library.

assessments.name: JavaScript (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of programming in the JavaScript language and its application in front-end development.

assessments.name: Node.js (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the basic knowledge of Node.js such as events, streams, file system, error handling, concurrency, DB handling and express framework.

assessments.name: ReactJS (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the technical knowledge of React APIs, render function, JSX, form validation and styling.

assessments.name: AngularJS (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of AngularJS architecture, forms, directives, filters, controllers, routing and testing.

assessments.name: Angular 6 (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of the basic components and modules of Angular 6 and concepts like data binding, dependency injection, CRUD with HTTP, typescript, routing and navigation.

assessments.name: HTML5 (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of HTML5 and its application in creating a user interface.

assessments.name: CSS3 (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of CSS3 and its application in providing style to web documents.

assessments.name: C# Programming (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of C# programming structure, functions, collections, enumeration, exception handling, OOPs constructs, inheritance, event handling and operator overloading.

assessments.name: C++ Programming (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of programming in the C++ language and the ability to use the C++ standard library to write code.

assessments.name: C Programming (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of C programming basics, functions, arrays, composed data types, and advanced C concepts like SLF, file handling and dynamic memory.

assessments.name: PHP (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of OOPs & programming constructs, web & database handling and advanced PHP.

assessments.name: Ruby on Rails (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Ruby Programming, Rails installation, Rails MVC and Rails programming model.

assessments.name: Selenium (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Selenium IDE, Selenium RC, Selenium grid, web driver, test design considerations, user extensions, frameworks and object repository.

assessments.name: Manual Testing (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of the software testing life cycle, testing tools and techniques, design of test cases and generation of test reports.

assessments.name: Agile Software Development
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of agile methodology, scrum, feature driven software development, incremental and iterative development and processes involved in agile software development.

assessments.name: Automata (New)
assessments.description: An AI-powered coding simulation assessment that evaluates candidate's programming ability. Offers a familiar IDE environment available in over 40 different programming languages and tests candidates using real-world coding problems.

assessments.name: Automata - SQL (New)
assessments.description: A simulated query writing test that measures the ability to write SQL queries to perform DDL, DML and DCL tasks.

assessments.name: Smart Interview Live Coding
assessments.description: Smart Interview Live Coding is a real-time online coding interview, with a compiler interface. It enables one-to-one, panel and group interviews to comprehensively evaluate candidates' skills across various technical roles.

assessments.name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire OPQ32r
assessments.description: The SHL Occupational Personality Questionnaire, the OPQ32, is one of the most widely used and respected measures of workplace behavioural style in the world, providing a clear framework for understanding the impact of personality on job performance.

assessments.name: OPQ Leadership Report
assessments.description: This OPQ (Occupational Personality Questionnaire) report provides a detailed analysis of an individual's leadership potential, based on SHL's leading edge Leadership Model, providing a competency based approach to leadership.

assessments.name: OPQ Universal Competency Report 2.0
assessments.description: This OPQ (Occupational Personality Questionnaire) report is based on the Universal Competency framework. It graphically outlines how an individual's typical way of behaving is likely to impact on competencies.

assessments.name: OPQ MQ Sales Report
assessments.description: This OPQ (Occupational Personality Questionnaire) report provides a graphical and narrative summary of an individual's natural style that is critical to sales success. It can also, optionally, use input from the SHL Motivation Questionnaire (MQ) to add sales motivators and drives.

assessments.name: Sales Transformation 2.0 - Individual Contributor
assessments.description: This report draws insights from the OPQ. It provides an accurate and objective measure of a salesperson's ability to sell well in a digital first environment, with scores for behaviours in SHL's Sales Transformation behavioural model.

assessments.name: Sales Transformation Report 2.0 - Sales Manager
assessments.description: This report combines insights from the OPQ and a Sales Management questionnaire, providing a measure of a sales manager's capability to lead a sales team undergoing a sales transformation process.

assessments.name: Dependability and Safety Instrument (DSI)
assessments.description: The DSI is a short pre-screening tool for many key entry-level roles, designed to identify potential employees who will have good dependability and reliability, and who are less likely to engage in counter-productive work behaviors.

assessments.name: Manufac. & Indust. - Safety & Dependability 8.0
assessments.description: The Manufacturing & Industrial Safety & Dependability Focus 8.0 Job-Focused Assessment measures the behaviors that underlie safe performance in a work setting, including behaving safely, complying with rules, applying domain expertise, and attending to multiple tasks.

assessments.name: Manufac. & Indust. - Mechanical & Vigilance 8.0
assessments.description: Measures the behaviors that underlie successful and safe performance in an industrial/manufacturing setting, assessing process monitoring, mechanical comprehension and other foundational safety behaviors.

assessments.name: HIPAA (Security)
assessments.description: The HIPAA (Security) test measures knowledge of compliance with the standards required by the Security and Electronic Signature Standards as they apply to HIPAA, covering both nontechnical and technical aspects.

assessments.name: Medical Terminology (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of different medical terms and abbreviations related to the human body, diseases and diagnosis.

assessments.name: Nursing (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of carrying out various nursing tasks.

assessments.name: Microsoft Word 365 - Essentials (New)
assessments.description: The Microsoft Word 365 - Essentials simulation evaluates ability to perform certain operations in a simulated environment of Microsoft Word, covering illustrations, page layout, content creation, formatting, proofreading and document security.

assessments.name: Microsoft Word 365 (New)
assessments.description: The Microsoft Word 365 simulation evaluates ability to perform certain operations in a simulated environment of Microsoft Word, including illustrations, page layout, content creation, formatting, proofreading and document security.

assessments.name: MS Word (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the ability to use MS Word to record and save textual information.

assessments.name: Microsoft Excel 365 (New)
assessments.description: The Microsoft Excel 365 simulation evaluates ability to perform certain operations in a simulated environment of MS Excel, covering formulas and functions, data creation and analysis, formatting, worksheet management, visual presentation and workbook security.

assessments.name: MS Excel (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the ability to use MS Excel to maintain, organize, analyze and present numeric data.

assessments.name: MS PowerPoint (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of MS PowerPoint toolbars, slide layouts, animation, slideshow, slide designs and formats.

assessments.name: Basic Computer Literacy (Windows 10) (New)
assessments.description: Measures knowledge of general computer terminology, processes, and applications and the ability to perform certain operations in a simulated environment resembling actual applications.

assessments.name: SHL Verify Interactive G+
assessments.description: SHL Verify Interactive G+ (SVIG+) is a test of general cognitive ability that also generates accurate assessments of three specific abilities: Deductive Reasoning, Inductive Reasoning, and Numerical Reasoning, plus a general ability score.

assessments.name: Verify - G+
assessments.description: The G+ test is part of the Verify suite of cognitive ability tests, measuring Numerical, Deductive, and Inductive ability. Appropriate for all job levels and roles due to its adaptive nature.

assessments.name: SHL Verify Interactive – Numerical Reasoning
assessments.description: Assesses how the candidate comprehends numerical information in various formats.

assessments.name: SHL Verify Interactive – Deductive Reasoning
assessments.description: Measures the ability to draw logical conclusions based on information provided, identify strengths and weaknesses of arguments, and complete scenarios using incomplete information.

assessments.name: SHL Verify Interactive - Inductive Reasoning
assessments.description: Evaluates ability to identify specific patterns in data or situations and generalize that information to broader contexts.

assessments.name: Verify - Numerical Ability
assessments.description: Measures the ability to derive the numerical problem from a written problem, calculate the answer to numerical equations, and work with numerical data in a realistic workplace context.

assessments.name: Verify - Deductive Reasoning
assessments.description: Measures the ability to draw logical conclusions based on information provided, identify strengths and weaknesses of arguments, and complete scenarios using incomplete information. 18 minutes, 20 items.

assessments.name: Verify - Inductive Reasoning (2014)
assessments.description: Test used for job candidates applying to jobs at all levels that require logical reasoning ability - dealing with new concepts, answering 'why' and 'how', resolving complex and ambiguous problems.

assessments.name: Verify - Verbal Ability - Next Generation
assessments.description: Measures ability to read written passages and comprehend text, interpret tone and author intent, identify main ideas, and predict author responses.

assessments.name: Verify - General Ability Screen
assessments.description: A measure of general mental ability ('g') targeted at entry-level roles, intended to precede other measures for process efficiency in screening or sifting processes.

assessments.name: Graduate Scenarios
assessments.description: A unique test of Managerial Judgement designed to assess judgement in graduates, a group with typically limited work experience. Consists of hypothetical scenarios with several possible responses rated for effectiveness.

assessments.name: Executive Scenarios
assessments.description: A unique test of Managerial Judgement specifically designed to assess judgement in Executives, a group with significant work experience. Hypothetical scenarios each followed by several possible responses rated for effectiveness.

assessments.name: Management Scenarios
assessments.description: A unique test of Managerial Judgement - an individual's ability to decide on effective ways of handling real life situations, via hypothetical scenarios rated for response effectiveness.

assessments.name: SVAR - Spoken English (US) (New)
assessments.description: An automated spoken English test that measures fluency, pronunciation, active listening, vocabulary, grammar and spoken English understanding.

assessments.name: SVAR - Spoken English (U.K.)
assessments.description: An automated spoken English test that measures fluency, pronunciation, active listening, vocabulary, grammar and spoken English understanding.

assessments.name: SVAR - Spoken English (AUS)
assessments.description: An automated spoken English test that measures fluency, pronunciation, active listening, vocabulary, grammar and spoken English understanding.

assessments.name: SVAR - Spoken English (Indian Accent) (New)
assessments.description: An automated spoken English test that measures fluency, pronunciation, active listening, vocabulary, grammar and spoken English understanding, calibrated for Indian-accented speech.

assessments.name: Contact Center Call Simulation (New)
assessments.description: Simulation based test that measures the ability to handle customer concerns over a call by referring to standard process documents. Also measures typing and documentation skills.

assessments.name: Customer Service Phone Simulation
assessments.description: Designed for entry-level positions in a contact center environment: verify accounts, take ownership of customer issues, interact with customers, respond to difficult callers, navigate information menus, and type quickly and accurately.

assessments.name: Entry Level Customer Serv-Retail & Contact Center
assessments.description: For entry-level positions where employees interact with customers by providing information or carrying out customer requests: interacting on the phone or in person, taking orders, solving issues, responding positively to difficult customers.

assessments.name: Sales & Service Phone Simulation
assessments.description: Designed for contact center roles involving sales or sales-related behaviors such as recommending products or retaining customers, via phone interaction.

assessments.name: Financial Accounting (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the ability to post journal entries, classify items into assets and liabilities, analyze financial statements and calculate financial ratios.

assessments.name: Basic Statistics (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of statistical methods, exploratory analysis, basics of probability, standard distributions and statistical testing.

assessments.name: Financial and Banking Services (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of investment products, banking products, taxation and principles of Macroeconomics.

assessments.name: Accounts Payable (New)
assessments.description: Multiple-choice test that measures the knowledge of processing payables and vendor invoices, and the posting of journal entries.

assessments.name: Accounts Receivable (New)
assessments.description: Multiple-choice test that measures the knowledge of processing receivables and invoices.

assessments.name: Human Resources (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of basic HR concepts: planning, training and development, performance appraisal, compensation management, and organizational behavior.

assessments.name: Marketing (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the conceptual knowledge of marketing principles, market research, consumer behavior, brand management, sales management, channel management and advertisement management.

assessments.name: Operations Management (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of planning, product design and development, quality management and supply chain management.

assessments.name: Workplace Health and Safety (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of first aid, emergency safety measures, cleanliness and personal hygiene.

assessments.name: Multitasking Ability
assessments.description: A measure of one's ability to adeptly work on more than one task simultaneously, while maintaining efficiency and effectiveness when interrupted or switching between tasks, via a split-screen simulation.

assessments.name: Data Entry (New)
assessments.description: Simulated data entry test that measures the ability to accurately transcribe data from pre-filled forms and the ability to verify pre-filled data.

assessments.name: Typing (New)
assessments.description: Typing based test that evaluates typing speed and accuracy.

assessments.name: Interviewing and Hiring Concepts (U.S.)
assessments.description: Measures knowledge of the interviewing and hiring process, covering behavior traits, behavioral interviewing, candidate fit, legal compliance, job analysis, screening and situational interviews.

assessments.name: Business Communications
assessments.description: Measures knowledge of communicating in the workplace effectively with coworkers and external business contacts, covering electronic communication, listening, meetings, and written/verbal communication.

assessments.name: Time Management (U.S.)
assessments.description: Adaptive test measuring knowledge of using time wisely in the workplace: action plans, decision making, organizing, planning, scheduling and time wasters.

assessments.name: Mechanical Engineering (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the conceptual knowledge of fluid and machine mechanics, thermodynamics, IC engines and manufacturing science.

assessments.name: Electrical Engineering (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of basic electrical engineering, electrical machines, power systems, instrumentation, control systems and basic concepts of electronics.

assessments.name: Civil Engineering (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of structural engineering, transportation engineering, surveying, geotechnical engineering and water resources engineering.

assessments.name: Chemical Engineering (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the conceptual knowledge of transport phenomena, chemical process engineering and technology, chemical process principles, stoichiometry and process calculations.

assessments.name: Industrial Engineering (New)
assessments.description: Multi-choice test that measures the conceptual knowledge of design, quality control, reliability, management and costing of manufacturing systems.

assessments.name: Reading Comprehension v2
assessments.description: Provides a general measure of English reading comprehension, comprised of passages the candidate must read to answer questions demonstrating understanding of specific and general meaning.

assessments.name: Written English v1
assessments.description: Measures knowledge of US English grammar and English reading comprehension, designed for those with English as a second language.

assessments.name: Business Communication (adaptive)
assessments.description: Adaptive test measuring knowledge of communicating in the workplace: electronic communication, employment communication, listening, meetings, and verbal/written communication.

assessments.name: Motivation Questionnaire MQM5
assessments.description: Measures 18 dimensions of an individual's motivation, providing a comprehensive understanding of what increases and reduces their motivation at work.

assessments.name: AI Skills
assessments.description: The AI Skills assessment measures the skills that help candidates successfully leverage AI in their work.

assessments.name: RemoteWorkQ
assessments.description: Measures self-reported behavioral tendencies in competency areas important to performing effectively in remote work environments: Work Relationships, Work Habits, and Self-Development & Well-Being.
